title: isodon flabelliformis
intro: Isodon flabelliformis, also known as Chinese dwarf golden root or small-leaved golden root, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family, Lamiaceae. The plant is traditionally used in Chinese medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Isodon flabelliformis include its ability to relieve symptoms of respiratory infections, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Isodon flabelliformis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
